name: 03_js_logic_abc_merge
description: Same-line adjacent edits: upstream a1bc vs fork ab2c (scenario 2)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in logic.js. Upstream return is a1bc, fork is ab2c. Merge to return the literal a1b2c. Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in logic.js. Combine a1bc and ab2c into a1b2c in generateCode. Do not leave conflict markers.
